# Sub-Level 41.1

### **Description**

Students solve multiplication facts and two-digit by one-digit multiplication using slightly smaller numbers while reinforcing multiplication tables.

### **Sections**

### **Section A: Multiplication Facts**

Examples

* 6 × 7 \= \_\_\_  
* 8 × 5 \= \_\_\_  
* 9 × 4 \= \_\_\_

### **Section B: Complete the Table**

| ×6 | Answer |
| ----- | ----- |
| 1 × 6 | 6 |
| 2 × 6 | 12 |
| 3 × 6 | \_\_\_ |
| 4 × 6 | 24 |
| 5 × 6 | \_\_\_ |

### **Section C: Two-Digit × One-Digit**

Examples

34 × 5  
26 × 4  
42 × 3
